title: Simple Economy
description: This plugin provide a coin system if you server have mine gamemodes then you can reward the player bu given some coin to the winner. Tis is my second plugin if you find any error you can tell me in the support link
body:
**INFO**

A lightweight and universal Coin Economy Plugin designed for all types of Minecraft servers, providing a simple, fast, and reliable way to manage coins across minigames, lobbies, survival worlds, quests, events, and custom game modes.
**COMMANDS**

/coin to check your balance, /coin add <player> <amount> to reward players, /coin remove <player> <amount> to deduct coins, /coin set <player> <amount> to set a specific balance, and /coin reset <player> to reset a player’s coins.
**Why Should You Use This Plugin**

it provides a simple, lightweight, and lag-free coin system for any type of Minecraft server.
